expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: heatmap highlighting effect scenarios cover activation, persistence, and reset behavior
expectations.evidence: In result.md the focus is stated and covered with dedicated sections: "Focus: Heatmap highlighting effect scenarios covering activation, persistence, and reset behavior" and the plan includes "1) Activation behavior", "2) Persistence behavior", and "3) Reset behavior" with multiple scenarios under each.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly labels the deliverable as phase4a ("VIZ-P4A-HEATMAP-HIGHLIGHT-001 — Phase 4a" and "Primary phase under test: phase4a") and provides scenario-level coverage (what to test / expected results) rather than execution results; it also includes a "Phase 4a Contract Check" stating "Alignment with phase4a: Yes".
